personality: 6 Glass / Luxe DARK with 3 Editorial Typography
personality_one_liner: Cinematic, high-end barbershop experience blending dark wood aesthetics with warm gold accents and elegant editorial typography.

spacing.rule: Use cinematic padding (xl/2xl) at screen roots. Ensure scrolling content does not hide behind sticky CTAs by using equivalent bottom padding. Keep empty spaces intentional.

do's: Use glass for sticky headers, bottom tabs, bottom sheets, and the background of sticky bottom CTAs.
Pair blur with a translucent tinted base (>= 75% surface) underneath to guarantee foreground readability.
Apply glass on featured cards paired with imagery underneath.
dont's: Never apply glass to form fields or body text regions.
Do not use generic blue/purple tints in the glass overlay.

screens.name: CustomerHome
screens.purpose: A premium discovery and booking interface allowing clients to view services (taglio uomo, barba) and initiate a booking.

states.loading: Centered sophisticated spinner with a dark gold accent.
states.empty: Stylized barber tools illustration indicating 'No services available currently.'
states.error: Elegant error message 'Unable to load services' with a subtle 'Retry' CTA.

screens.layout: Hero image of a high-end barbershop (dark wood, warm lighting) with a gradient-to-dark scrim (top->bottom, transparent to 80% surfaceInverse). Below hero: 'Our Services' listed as rows (tinted icon container + title + chevron) with generous md/lg padding. A sticky 'Book Appointment' CTA at the bottom using a glass container.

screens.name: CustomerWaitlist
screens.purpose: Enables users to join a waitlist for fully-booked days and receive notifications upon cancellation.
screens.layout: Date picker calendar. If a date is fully booked, show a 'Capacity Full' badge. Display a prominent 'Join Waitlist' CTA in the bottom thumb zone. Include a toggle for SMS/Push notifications. Minimal form if required.

screens.name: AdminDashboard
screens.purpose: Treatwell-style central diary and command center for barbershop staff to manage bookings, waitlists, and revenue.

states.empty: Clear schedule message: 'No appointments today. Enjoy the calm.'

screens.layout: Centralized Diary/Timeline calendar block showing today's appointments. Quick action FAB (glass) to 'Block Time' or 'New Booking'. Top summary cards for 'Today's Revenue' and 'Waitlist queue'. Use edge-to-edge structural grids without heavy shadows.

screens.name: AdminClientManagement
screens.purpose: Client database where admins can enforce online payments or blacklist problematic users.

states.empty: No clients found. Search to begin.

screens.layout: Search bar at the top. List view of clients. Tapping a client opens a bottom sheet (glass header) with segmented controls or toggles for 'Require Stripe Payment' and 'Blacklist Client'. Action buttons use brandPrimary for high visibility.

hero_barbershop.alt: High-end barbershop interior with dark leather chairs and warm brick walls

hero_barbershop_dark.alt: Moody salon interior with lighted pendant lamps

empty_tools.alt: Dark aesthetic close up of barber tools in a black case

logo_barbershop.alt: Vintage barbershop logo design on glass window

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette: Avoid ANY blues, purples, or generic AI pastel colors. The theme is an ultra-premium, dark wood, masculine aesthetic featuring deep obsidian (0F1014) and aged gold (C89B3C).
Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for display titles and 'Satoshi' for body text. Ensure max font weight is 500 across the app to maintain the premium editorial feel.

Implement the 'gradient scrim' pattern for any text over images (e.g., the Home screen hero image): A linear gradient from transparent down to >=80% surfaceInverse opacity must sit between the image and text.
Admin Dashboard layout must be optimized for dense operational use but maintain the Luxe Dark aesthetic. Use edge-to-edge layouts for the diary and subtle dividers instead of heavy card shadows.
For the Waitlist flow, ensure a prominent 'Capacity Full' badge is visible when dates are taken, paired with a sticky glass-backed CTA to 'Join Waitlist'.
For Client Management, the 'Force Online Payment' and 'Blacklist' functionalities should be easily accessible via toggles inside a glass-header bottom sheet.
Public shareable link functionality: The app must support Expo Router Deep Linking so the booking flow can be launched via an Instagram bio link. Treat the web target as a primary citizen.
Ensure sticky bottom buttons have safe-area padding at the bottom and use a glass container background over scrolling content.
